title: Curiosity Overloaded
description: An extension of Euphoric Curiosity that adds a few QOL changes and some additional Create additions.
body:
An extension of Euphoric Curiosity that adds a few QOL changes and some additional Create additions.

This pack is meant to be maintained longterm and will have fixes to the original, additional mods, and possibly rebalanced mechanics over time. Currently, Create:New Age has been added to allow a bridge between Create and the other tech mods within the pack.

This pack includes other mods that can be found in Euphoric Curiosity such as:

Deep Mob Learning (https://modrinth.com/mod/deep-mob-learning-refabricated)

More Villagers (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-villagers-fabric)

Cultural Creators(https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cultural-creators-fabric-create-and-cultural)
